query_title: The Seed of the Sacred Fig

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.

recommendations.title: Mersal
recommendations.overview: A few individuals in the medical profession are murdered or kidnapped, and the cop investigating the case suspects a doctor and arrests him. But is he the one who is behind these crimes? And why are they being committed?

recommendations.title: Miss Sloane
recommendations.overview: An ambitious lobbyist faces off against the powerful gun lobby in an attempt to pass gun control legislation.

recommendations.title: Loving Adults
recommendations.overview: The thin line between love and hate turns deadly when a wife discovers her husband’s affair — and they both take extreme measures to get what they want.

recommendations.title: What Doesn't Kill You
recommendations.overview: Two childhood friends from South Boston turn to crime as a way to get by, ultimately causing a strain in their personal lives and their friendship.

recommendations.title: Violent Cop
recommendations.overview: A detective breaks all rules of ethical conduct while investigating a colleague’s involvement in drug pushing and Yakuza activities.

recommendations.title: Luce
recommendations.overview: A star athlete and top student, Luce's idealized image is challenged by one of his teachers when his unsettling views on political violence come to light, putting a strain on family bonds while igniting intense debates on race and identity.

recommendations.title: Black Coal, Thin Ice
recommendations.overview: Two former cops start investigating the series of murders that tanked their careers when the killings begin again.

recommendations.title: Changeling
recommendations.overview: Los Angeles, 1928. When single mother Christine Collins leaves for work, her son vanishes without a trace. Five months later, the police reunite mother and son. But when Christine suspects that the boy returned to her isn't her child, her quest for t

recommendations.title: Miller's Crossing
recommendations.overview: Set in 1929, a political boss and his advisor have a parting of the ways when they both fall for the same woman.
